declarations.title: Declarations
declarations.subtitle: Reporting period {{period}} · D300 is computed here; detailed computations (e-TVA, D390, D394, D100, D101, D406) are also in Reports
declarations.noCompany: Select an active company to view the declarations.

notify.noData: There is no data for the selected period.
notify.noExportData: There is no data to export. Compute D300 first.
notify.dukErrors: DUKIntegrator found errors. Fix them or export anyway.
notify.d300OfficialSavedNoDuk: Official D300 saved: {{path}} (DUK validation unavailable locally)
notify.exportD300OfficialFailed: Could not export the official D300.

d300.title: VAT return
d300.desc1: Rows are filled in automatically from the journals;
d300.desc2: are pre-filled on R16/R30 with manual override. The official export (schema v12) requires the declarant's details, CAEN, the bank, and goes through DUKIntegrator validation.
d300.extractTitle: Export a D300 extract as an XML file (working document, not the ANAF schema)
d300.officialTitle: Export D300 according to the official ANAF schema v12
d300.previewFailed: Could not generate the D300 XML.

d390.title: VIES recapitulative statement
d390.descOutro: Partners without a valid VIES code are flagged at computation.

d394.title: Domestic supplies and acquisitions
d394.desc: Informative declaration per partner, generated from the issued and received invoices with a valid RO CIF. Partners are aggregated automatically at computation.

saft.title: SAF-T — the standard audit file
saft.desc: Full monthly reporting: master files, source documents, GL. Generation takes a few minutes; validation is done with the DUK SAF-T validator.

d100.title: Payment obligations — tax
d100.desc3: . For Q4 on profit tax, the annual adjustment is done through D101.

d101.title: Profit tax — annual
d101.desc1: The carried-forward fiscal loss is recovered within the limit of
d101.desc2: of the taxable profit. The fiscal credit for sponsorships applies within the legal limit.

etva.title: Pre-filled return reconciliation
etva.desc1: ANAF sends the pre-filled return P300ETVA (downloaded from SPV); differences of
etva.desc2: are significant and are justified through a “Justification note”. With cash-accounting VAT, divergences are expected.

intrastat.title: Intra-EU trade statistics
intrastat.desc: An obligation only when the annual thresholds are exceeded (arrivals 1,000,000 lei / dispatches 1,000,000 lei). Thresholds are monitored automatically from invoices.

detail.title: D300 detail — {{period}}

collected.title: Collected VAT (sales)
collected.empty: There are no VALIDATED invoices in the selected period.

deductible.title: Deductible VAT (purchases)
deductible.desc: Deductible VAT is computed from the processed received invoices. Check that all of the month's invoices have been downloaded and parsed from SPV for a correct return.
deductible.computeFirst: Compute D300 to see the data.
deductible.noneParsed: No received invoice parsed in the period.
deductible.manualHint: · for purchases without a parsed SPV invoice
deductible.resetTitle: Reset to the automatically computed value

detail.unparsedVat_one: {{count}} received invoice does not yet have a VAT breakdown
detail.unparsedVat_other: {{count}} received invoices do not yet have a VAT breakdown
detail.unparsedRest: — the automatically computed amount may be partial. Enter the correct value manually below or use “Recompute VAT from XML” in the Purchases journal.

reg.title: Old-rate adjustments (19%/9%/5%)
reg.desc: Operations at old rates are reported automatically in the adjustment rows (R16 — collected tax; R30 — deducted tax). Check and adjust if necessary.
reg.resetTitle: Reset to the automatically computed values

d390.title: D390 — Recapitulative statement (VIES) intra-EU
d390.previewFailed: Could not build the D390 XML.
d390.empty: No intra-EU operation (vat_category «K») in the selected period.
d390.droppedRest: — partner without a valid EU VAT code (missing code / non-EU prefix) or negative net base (credit note across another period — the «R» adjustment is declared manually; the T/triangular and R types are not yet generated automatically). Fill in the partner's CUI or declare the adjustment manually to avoid under-reporting in VIES.
d390.rectificativeHint: Files a correction of an already-submitted declaration for the same period (d_rec=1); it contains the full recomputed dataset.

notify.noOps: There are no intra-EU operations in the selected period.

d394.title: D394 — Informative declaration of supplies / acquisitions per partner
d394.officialTitle: Export D394 according to the official ANAF schema v5
d394.previewFailed: Could not generate the D394 XML.
d394.rectificativeNote: D394 has NO rectificative version in the XML. To correct it, re-file the FULL declaration for the same period (OPANAF 3769/2015) — the last filed declaration replaces the previous one.
d394.emptySales: No validated supply in the selected period.
d394.unparsedRest1: — the supplier list is partial. Use
d394.unparsedRest2: in the Purchases journal to complete the data.
d394.emptyPurchases: No received invoice in the selected period.
d394.emptyUnparsed: No received invoice with a parsed VAT breakdown. Use «Recompute VAT from XML» in the Purchases journal.

notify.officialSavedNoDuk: Official D394 saved: {{path}} (DUK validation unavailable locally)
notify.exportOfficialFailed: Could not export the official D394.

d100.title: D100 — Payment obligations (quarterly)
d100.banner: The quarterly row for the selected period (Q{{q}} {{year}}): micro → position 5 (1% × revenue), profit → position 2 (16% × result). Due date: the 25th of the month following the quarter (profit Q4 is adjusted through D101). Filing is done manually through the ANAF smart PDF + SPV. The micro regime (1%) assumes continuous fulfilment of the legal conditions (100,000 EUR threshold from 2026, employee, revenue structure, shareholders) — the app does not check them all; confirm eligibility.

dividends.title: Dividend tax (informational)
dividends.note: Dividend-tax obligations due this quarter. The tax is declared via D100, due the 25th of the month after payment. Informational row — D100 has no XML/DUK validation; confirm and file through the ANAF smart PDF + SPV.

d101.title: D101 — Profit tax (computation sheet)
d101.banner2: (not micro-enterprises). The gross result and the turnover are taken from the period's profit and loss statement; enter the fiscal adjustments. Recovery of losses from previous years is capped at 70% of the fiscal profit (OUG 115/2023). Filing is done manually through the ANAF smart PDF + SPV (deadline 25 June of the following year for fiscal years 2021-2025, afterwards 25 March). The estimate does not include all possible adjustments.

fields.priorLoss: Fiscal loss to recover from previous years
fields.anticipatedPayments: Anticipated payments / tax declared via D100

etva.title: RO e-TVA — pre-filled return reconciliation (internal check)
etva.banner1: The RO e-TVA conformance notification has been
etva.banner2: (OUG 89/2025 and OUG 13/2026, in force 9 Mar 2026). The pre-filled return (P300ETVA) remains
etva.banner3: and is available in SPV until the 5th of the month following the D300 deadline. This check compares the app-computed D300 with the values you import from the pre-filled return,
etva.banner4: filing your own D300 (the only one with legal value). Automatic download from SPV is not available locally.
etva.fetchTitle: Download the pre-filled return (P300ETVA) from SPV
etva.filesHint: Pre-filled data from SPV (copy the collected / deductible VAT values into the fields above):
etva.cash2: — divergences from the pre-filled return (built on e-Factura data, not on collection) are
etva.footSignificant: There are significant differences (≥20% and ≥5,000 lei). Investigate (missing invoice, period offset, reverse charge) before filing.
etva.footOk: No significant difference against the 20% and 5,000 lei threshold.

notify.fetchFailed: Could not download the pre-filled return from SPV.
